template_clarity pattern.json 16 tmpl-pattern-A-05 [PASS] (1.00) {"auditType":"template_clarity","file":"pattern.json","templateId":"tmpl-pattern-A-05","conceptId":"pattern-001","sampleCount":16,"issueCount":0,"issueCodes":{},"examples":[],"promptSamples":[{"params":{"d":3,"k":4,"t":7},"prompt":"규칙이 △ = ○ × 4 + 3일 때 ○가 7이면 △는?"},{"params":{"d":6,"k":7,"t":11},"prompt":"규칙이 △ = ○ × 7 + 6일 때 ○가 11이면 △는?"},{"params":{"d":4,"k":5,"t":9},"prompt":"규칙이 △ = ○ × 5 + 4일 때 ○가 9이면 △는?"}]} Pass Reason: All assertions passed

session_quality mixedcalc-001 11 A [PASS] (1.00) {"auditType":"session_quality","conceptId":"mixedcalc-001","conceptTitle":"혼합 계산","setId":"A","seed":11,"issueCount":0,"issues":[],"problemCount":10,"prompts":["(2 + 8) × 3 = ?","5 × 4 - 6 를 계산하세요.","(11 - 5) × 4 를 계산하세요.","(7 + 8) × (11 - 3) = ?","10 × 8 + 4 × 5 를 계산하세요.","7 × 4 + 4 를 계산하세요.","5 × (3 + 5) = ?","10 + 4 × 8 - 6 = ?","2 + 3 × 2 = ?","(5 + 9) × 4 - 6 를 계산하세요."]} Pass Reason: All assertions passed
session_quality mixedcalc-001 29 A [PASS] (1.00) {"auditType":"session_quality","conceptId":"mixedcalc-001","conceptTitle":"혼합 계산","setId":"A","seed":29,"issueCount":0,"issues":[],"problemCount":10,"prompts":["7 + 5 × 3 - 4 = ?","(12 - 6) × 5 를 계산하세요.","4 × 2 + 8 를 계산하세요.","4 × 3 - 7 를 계산하세요.","(4 + 8) × 2 = ?","7 + 4 × 5 = ?","4 × (5 + 5) = ?","(5 + 8) × 6 - 3 를 계산하세요.","7 × 8 + 6 × 9 를 계산하세요.","(8 + 7) × (13 - 7) = ?"]} Pass Reason: All assertions passed
